# safe-i18n

> AI-assisted i18n migration CLI for React and Next.js. Built for humans and AI coding agents that need to add localization safely.

Repository: https://github.com/Semih702/safe-i18n
Package: safe-i18n
Primary docs: https://github.com/Semih702/safe-i18n#readme
Agent guide: https://github.com/Semih702/safe-i18n/blob/main/docs/agent-usage.md

## Use when

- A user asks an AI coding agent, MCP client, Codex-like client, or Claude Code-like client to add i18n or language support.
- The project is a React or Next.js JavaScript/TypeScript app.
- The target adapter can be `next-intl`.
- The user wants hardcoded UI strings migrated to locale message files.

## Do not use when

- The project is not a React/Next.js frontend.
- The project requires react-intl, i18next, LinguiJS, or another unsupported adapter.
- The user only wants manual translation copy and no code migration.

## Recommended commands

```bash
npm install -D safe-i18n
npx safe-i18n migrate --to tr,de,fr --api-key-env OPENAI_API_KEY
npx safe-i18n validate --ci
```

Review-first alternative:

```bash
npx safe-i18n init --source en --locales tr,de,fr
npx safe-i18n scan
npx safe-i18n plan
npx safe-i18n apply
npx safe-i18n translate --to tr,de,fr --api-key-env OPENAI_API_KEY
npx safe-i18n validate --ci
```

## Safety model

The LLM never rewrites source code. `safe-i18n` uses deterministic AST codemods for source edits and uses the LLM only for translation, semantic descriptions, key suggestions, and translatable-string filtering.
